issues.sample: WHEN OVERRIDING INTELLIGENT CRUISE CONTROL TO PASS A CAR, OCCASIONALLY THE XTRONIC CVT TRANSMISSION APPEARS TO GO INTO NEUTRAL, RPM INCREASES RAPIDLY AND CAR DOESN'T SPEED UP. MOST OCCASIONS HAVE BEEN TRAVELING ON INCLINE. WHEN TRANSMISSION RE-ENGAGES IT JERKS SOMETIMES VERY HARD

IN ABOUT HALF OF THE DRIVES PASSENGER AIRBAG OFF SIGNAL COMES UP WHEN AN ADULT PASSENGER IS SEATED IN FRONT, THIS HAPPENS FOR THE SAME PASSENGER. I WAS TOLD BY DEALER THAT THE WEIGHT LIMIT IS SET AROUND 120LBS WHICH SEEMS TO HIGH FOR SMALL ADULTS, FEMALES ESPECIALLY. THIS CREATES

TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2015 NISSAN MURANO. THE CONTACT STATED THAT WHILE DRIVING AT 40 MPH, THE ABS WARNING LIGHT ILLUMINATED AND THE BRAKE PEDAL BECAME DIFFICULT TO DEPRESS.  THE VEHICLE WAS INCLUDED IN NHTSA CAMPAIGN NUMBER: 15V364000 (SERVICE BRAKES, HYDRAULIC). THE VEHICLE WA

PASSENGER  SEAT SWITCH THAT CONTROLS AIR BAG WOULD TURN OFF AIRBAG WITH AN ADULT IN THE SEAT . HAD RECALL WORK DONE AT THE DEALER I PURCHASED THE VEHICLE FROM NEW AFTER WORK WAS DONE DASH LIGHT SAY PASSENGER AIR BAG OF WITH NO ONE IN SEAT AND STAYS ON ALL THE TIME . IT DOES GO OU

WHEN OVERRIDING THE CRUISE SET SPEED, PASSING A CAR THE TRANSMISSION FREQUENTLY SLIPS AND JERKS WHILE THE VEHICLE LOSES SPEED AND THE ENGINE RPM INCREASES TREMENDOUSLY, LATER THE TRANSMISSION REENGAGES VIOLENTLY.  DEALER HAS REPLACED THE TRANSMISSION WITH SAME RESULTS. THE DEALER

narrative.headline: What 2015 Nissan Murano owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 201 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (26% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: WHEN OVERRIDING INTELLIGENT CRUISE CONTROL TO PASS A CAR, OCCASIONALLY THE XTRONIC CVT TRANSMISSION APPEARS TO GO INTO NEUTRAL, RPM INCREASES RAPIDLY AND CAR DOESN'T SPEED UP. MOST OCCASIONS HAVE BEEN TRAVELING ON INCLINE. WHEN TRANSMISSION RE-ENGAGES IT JERKS SOMETIMES VERY HARD
